title: Internal Revenue Bulletin Publishes Notice on 45Z Proposed Regulations and Guidance on Emissions Rates
content: Notice 2025-10 published in the Internal Revenue Bulletin announces forthcoming proposed regulations on the clean fuel production credit under Â§ 45Z (Â§ 45Z credit), enacted under the Inflation Reduction Act of 2022. The notice explains the forthcoming proposed regulations and requests public comments on the draft text of the forthcoming proposed regulations. Notice 2025-11 provides taxpayers with guidance about emissions rates, including the initial emissions rate table, for the clean fuel production credit.
author: Vineeth Chellakannu
